properties.title: A Népszava dolgozóinak felét is elküldhetik, ha végleg megszűnik a nyomtatott kiadás
properties.summary: A kiadó mögött álló Arago Zrt. vezérigazgatója befektetőkkel tárgyal. Ha nem jár sikerrel, még az is elképzelhető, hogy a Népszavát teljesen be kell zárják.

properties.title: Brutális támadás alatt Moszkva, ballisztikus rakétákat lőttek ki Kijevre – Percről percre híreink az orosz-ukrán háborúról csütörtökön
properties.summary: Oroszország mára virradóra több hullámban lőtt ki ballisztikus rakétákat és drónokat Kijevre. Az ukrán fővárosban először helyi idő szerint hajnali fél 1 körül lehetett hallani robbanásokat a Kyiv Independent szerint. A héten ez volt a második orosz csapássorozat Kijev ellen. Ukrajna mindeközben masszívan tűz alá vette Moszkvát, ez volt a legnagyobb dróntámadás az orosz főváros ellen az elmúlt két évben. Moszkva délkeleti részén, a Kapotnya nevű kerületben lévő olajfinomítónál lángokról és felszálló füstről érkeztek beszámolók. Szergej Szobjanyin moszkvai polgármester közölte, az orosz légvédelem 180 drónt semmisített meg. Cikkünk folyamatosan frissül az orosz-ukrán háború legfrissebb fejleményeivel.

properties.title: Hatalmas fejlesztést kapott az ukrajnai sztárfegyver: ezzel már a legveszélyesebb orosz rakétákat is leszedi
properties.summary: A Lockheed Martin jelentősen továbbfejlesztette a HIMARS rakéta-sorozatvetőt, így az új változat immár kétszeres tűzerőt kínál, miközben légvédelmi feladatok ellátására is alkalmassá vált - jelentette a RBK.

properties.title: Kisiklott egy vonat a szolnoki vonalon - Komoly korlátozásokra, pótlóbuszokra kell számítani
properties.summary: Kora délután kisiklott a Hatvanból Szolnokra tartó személyvonat Újszász állomásán. A tizenöt utast szállító járaton senki sem sérült meg, a baleset miatt azonban az érintett vasútvonalakon jelentős fennakadásokra kell számítani - írta meg a Hegyi Zsolt, a MÁV-csoport vezérigazgatója Facebookon.

properties.title: Nou mandat de arestare pe numele lui Ilan Şor. Procuratura de la Chișinău explică cum a delapidat oligarhul 100 de milioane de dolari
properties.summary: Judecătorii din Chișinău au dispus arestarea preventivă pentru 30 de zile, în lipsă, a oligarhului fugar Ilan Şor în dosarul privind delapidarea a 100 milioane de dolari de la Banca de Economii din Moldova (BEM), anunţă Procuratura Anticorupţie a Republicii Moldova.

properties.title: Nicuşor Dan participă la reuniunea Consiliului European. Pe agendă sunt subiecte importante pentru România
properties.summary: Preşedintele Nicuşor Dan participă joi şi vineri la reuniunea Consiliului European de la Bruxelles. Pe agenda reuniunii sunt subiecte prioritare pentru România, precum sprijinul pentru Ucraina și Republica Moldova și avansarea parcursului lor de aderare, viitorul Cadru financiar multianual 2028-2034, securitatea și apărarea europene, competitivitatea și provocările economice globale, potrivit unui comunicat al Administrației Prezidențiale.

properties.title: Momentul în care „capacul” unui rezervor gigantic de la rafinăria din Moscova a sărit zeci de metri în aer în urma atacului Ucrainei
properties.summary: Atacul ucrainean cu drone asupra rafinăriei Kapotnia din Moscova a produs imagini spectaculoase, surprinse de camere aflate în apropierea instalației. Un videoclip care circulă pe rețelele sociale arată momentul în care acoperișul unui rezervor de mari dimensiuni este aruncat la zeci de metri înălțime de forța exploziei.

properties.title: Timișoara pe locul 4 în noul Index de Atractivitate Urbană, cu o poziție mai sus față de 2024, dar sub Brașov, Cluj și Constanța
properties.summary:
Institutul pentru Orașe Vizionare (IOV) plasează Timișoara pe locul 4 în noul Index de Atractivitate Urbană, cu o poziție mai sus față de 2024, dar sub Brașov, Cluj și Constanța, relatează tion.ro. Timișoara a depășit Oradea și Sibiu, însă a fost întrecut de Constanța, care a intrat în premieră pe podiumul celor mai atractive municipii […]

© G4Media.ro.

properties.title: România discută cu Serbia un acord pentru hidrocentrala Porțile de Fier 3, astfel încât construcția de pe malul sârbesc al Dunării să nu ne afecteze
properties.summary: Guvernul a aprobat negocierea și semnarea unui Memorandum de Înțelegere cu Guvernul Republicii Serbia, pentru facilitarea schimbului de informații privind proiectul centralei hidroelectrice cu acumulare prin pompaj Djerdap (Porțile de Fier) 3. Sârbii ar dori să facă o hidrocentrală cu pompaj de de 1.800 MW, care ar urma să folosească apa Dunării din lacul din amonte de hidrocentrala Porțle de Fier 1.

properties.title: Bratislava prenajme hlavnú budovu Mičurin na 5 rokov za euro VŠVU
properties.summary: Vysokej škole výtvarných umení zároveň plánuje reštaurovať známe súsošie na streche budovy od umeleckého sochára Fraňa Gibalu.

properties.title: ONLINE: Rusko bude rozsáhle a pravidelně útočit na Ukrajinu, varoval Lavrov po zásahu rafinerie v Moskvě
properties.summary: Rusko bude pravidelně podnikat rozsáhlé útoky na objekty na Ukrajině, na nichž závisí bojeschopnost ukrajinské armády. Ve čtvrtek to podle agentury TASS řekl ruský ministr zahraničí Sergej Lavrov.

properties.title: Miała zaatakować 14-latka, bo mówił po ukraińsku
properties.summary: Policja bada sprawę incydentu na ulicy Świętej Barbary w Gdańsku, do którego doszło w niedzielny wieczór. Według zgłoszenia nieznana kobieta miała zaatakować dziecko. Jest poszukiwana przez policję.

properties.title: Konflikt Chin i Japonii coraz poważniejszy. "Relacje są psute celowo"
properties.summary: Chiny odcięły Japonię od swoich metali ziem rzadkich, zagrażając globalnym łańcuchom dostaw. Ku japońskim wybrzeżom coraz częściej wysyłają też okręty i samoloty. Relacje dwóch największych mocarstw Azji od dawna nie były tak złe.

properties.title: „Mes jį susigrąžinsime“: „Azov“ kariai pradėjo sisteminį okupuoto Mariupolio bombardavimą
properties.summary: Daugelis „Azov“ brigados kovotojų, iki paskutinės akimirkos gynusių Mariupolį, žuvo arba pateko į nelaisvę. Tačiau iš ten sugrįžę ir išgyvenę dabar ruošiasi susigrąžinti savo miestą, rašo naujienų agentūra „Reuters“.

properties.title: Par naida kurināšanu un uzbrukumu ar karstu eļļu pasākumā Ventspils novadā notiesā divas personas
properties.summary: Kurzemes rajona tiesa piespriedusi sodus divām personām, kas 2024. gada jūlijā publiskā pasākumā Ventspils novadā konfliktēja ar Ukrainas pilsoni, paužot ar viņa nacionālo piederību saistītus naidīgus izteikumus, un konflikta laikā nodarīja vidēji smagus miesas bojājumus arī citām personām. Sievietei piespriesta probācijas uzraudzība un sabiedriskais darbs, bet viņas dzīvesbiedram – brīvības atņemšana uz diviem gadiem.

properties.title: Zelensky: If attacks continue, Moscow will burn
properties.summary:
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has said that the intensive drone attacks on Russian territory are a response to the strike on a historic monastery in Kyiv, and that Moscow will also burn if the attacks continue, Reuters reports. A large number of drones were sent to Moscow on the night of the 18th of June, […]

properties.title: US-Iran deal: 14 points and support for reconstruction
properties.summary:
The White House has announced that the agreement to extend the ceasefire between the US and Iran has been signed and entered into force, but many unclear issues remain, writes the BBC. US President Donald Trump signed the agreement while attending a meeting of the G7 countries in France. The 14-point agreement, called a memorandum […]

properties.title: Latvenergo issues 300 million euros in Green Bonds
properties.summary:
Latvia’s state-owned energy company Latvenergo issued 300 million euros worth of seven-year unsecured European Green Bonds on the 16th of June, according to a statement submitted to the Nasdaq Riga stock exchange. The bonds carry a fixed annual interest rate of 4.162% and will mature on the 25th of June 2033. The issuance was carried […]

properties.title: Russian warship fires warning shots near British territorial waters
properties.summary:
A Russian warship fired warning shots in foggy weather in the English Channel to force a British civilian yacht to change course and avoid a collision, Reuters reports. According to statements from the British Ministry of Defense and the Russian Ministry of Defense, the crew of the warship Admiral Grigorovich spotted the yacht, whose course […]

The post Russian warship fires warning shots near British territorial waters appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Sardinia wants to save beaches; introduces entry fee and ban on parasols
properties.summary:
Visitors to the picturesque beaches of the Italian island of Sardinia must now count not only on mandatory reservations, but also on a widespread ban on the use of parasols, writes the BBC. Authorities responsible for the Punta Molente beach on the southeast coast of Sardinia have indicated that last summer’s forest fires devastated the […]

The post Sardinia wants to save beaches; introduces entry fee and ban on parasols appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Stradiņš Hospital sounds the alarm: Rīga needs another hospital
properties.summary:
Riga is lacking either an additional emergency care hospital or a facility capable of treating patients who do not require highly specialized medical services, according to Dace Žentiņa, a board member of Pauls Stradiņš Clinical University Hospital, speaking in an interview with Latvian Television’s Rīta panorāma. Commenting on the long queues that formed outside the […]

The post Stradiņš Hospital sounds the alarm: Rīga needs another hospital appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Dispute over the future of Rīgas Siltums: Kleinbergs sees the company under Rīga’s control
properties.summary:
AS Rīgas siltums needs a single owner, Rīga City Council Chairman Viesturs Kleinbergs said in an interview with Latvian Television’s Rīta panorāma. According to Kleinbergs, he and Prime Minister Andris Kulbergs share the view that the company should have one controlling shareholder. The key issue, however, is whether that owner should be the Latvian state […]

properties.title: First modular bomb shelter placed in Tallinn city center
properties.summary:
The first modular bomb shelter in Estonia has been placed in the green zone of Juhkentali Street in Tallinn, and its suitability for the urban environment and the attitude of residents will be assessed, writes ERR News. The shelter was donated to the city by the company Citysec Industry, and is made of reinforced concrete […]

The post First modular bomb shelter placed in Tallinn city center appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: MARUS ⟩ «Kindlasti ei tohi ta vabaneda!» Valgas jõhkralt tapetud mehe lähedased ei toeta süüdistatava võimalikku vabastamist
properties.summary: Aprilli alguses vapustas Eestit uudis Valgast, kus rahuliku Pedeli jõe ääres pandi toime erakordselt julm tapmine. Elu kaotas 37-aastane Maido, keda peksti, pussitati ja seejärel jõkke visati. Täna toimus Tartu maakohtu Valga kohtumajas istung seoses Kaie Kruusamägiga, kes on üks tapmises süüdistatavatest isikutest. Kaie viibib vahi all ja on esitanud taotluse pääseda vabadusse elektroonilise valve alla. «Tahan oma laste eest hoolitseda ja tööle minna,» ütleb Kaie. Maido lähedased leiavad aga, et naine ei tohi mingil juhul vabaneda.

properties.title: Tallinn Dolls valis oma salapärase uue projekti etteotsa Anu Saagimi
properties.summary: Selles on sära ja kergust, aga ka sügavust, iseloomu ja parajalt metsikust – just nii kirjeldavad asjaosalised uut parfüümi «Eesti Suvi», millega Tallinn Dolls teeb oma suure debüüdi lõhnamaailmas. Pole juhus, et parfüümi kampaaniasse valiti Eesti meelelahutusmaailma esileedi Anu Saagim.

properties.title: VÄGA KULUKAS! ⟩ «See ei tule mulle absoluutselt üllatusena...» Mallukas avaldas kohtukulud vaidluses Tanel Padariga
properties.summary: Blogija Mallu Mariann Treimann-Legrant on toonud avalikkuse ette uue detaili oma kohtuvaidlusest Tanel Padariga, avaldades oma blogis, kui suureks kujunes tema õigusabikulu.
